chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

text: 2486 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «اَلْإِبِلُ عِزٌّ لِأَهْلِهَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2486 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"Camels are a source of honor for their owners."
